variables.name: default theme/text/primary
variables.description: Main high-contrast text color. Used for body text, titles, headlines and primary icons to ensure maximum readability.

variables.name: default theme/text/primary-inverse
variables.description: Inverted text color for dark buttons and dark backgrounds. Used on dark surfaces (like primary-inverse backgrounds) to maintain contrast.

variables.name: default theme/text/secondary
variables.description: Medium-contrast supportive text. Used for secondary labels, subtitles, metadata, and placeholder text.

variables.name: default theme/text/tertiary
variables.description: Low-contrast text for disabled or subtle info. Used for disabled states, hints, or non-essential decorative text.

variables.name: default theme/text/action
variables.description: Brand-colored interactive text. Used for links, clickable labels, and active navigation items.

variables.name: default theme/text/action-highlight
variables.description: Darker brand text for active/pressed states. Used for links and clickable labels when the mouse hovers over them.

variables.name: default theme/text/caution
variables.description: Dark text for warning context. Used for warning messages or status labels that require user attention.

variables.name: default theme/text/caution-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for warning-related text. Enhances visibility for interactive warning elements during hover.

variables.name: default theme/text/danger
variables.description: Dark text for error context. Used for error messages, critical alerts, and destructive action labels.

variables.name: default theme/text/danger-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for error-related text. Visual feedback for interactive destructive or error-prone elements.

variables.name: default theme/background/primary
variables.description: Main application surface. The base color for the entire page or main content areas.

variables.name: default theme/background/primary-inverse
variables.description: High-contrast dark surface. Use for high-emphasis containers like dark headers, sidebars, or hero cards.

variables.name: default theme/background/secondary
variables.description: Subtle secondary surface. Use for section backgrounds, form inputs, or to differentiate cards from the main page.

variables.name: default theme/background/tertiary
variables.description: Low-priority decorative surface. Use for disabled button backgrounds, progress bar tracks, or divider-like containers.

variables.name: default theme/background/action
variables.description: Brand-colored action surface. The base color for primary buttons, active toggles, and brand-heavy elements.

variables.name: default theme/background/action-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for action surfaces. Specifically for primary button hover effects and interactive brand surfaces.

variables.name: default theme/background/caution
variables.description: Subtle amber background. Background color for warning banners, toast notifications, and alert callouts.

variables.name: default theme/background/caution-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for warning surfaces. Feedback color for interactive warning cards or actionable alerts on hover.

variables.name: default theme/background/danger
variables.description: Subtle red background. Background color for error banners, destructive action dialogs, or invalid states.

variables.name: default theme/background/danger-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for danger surfaces. Feedback color for "Delete" buttons or destructive UI elements on hover.

variables.name: default theme/border/primary
variables.description: High-contrast border. Use for component outlines, input field borders, and strong layout dividers.

variables.name: default theme/border/primary-inverse
variables.description: Inverted border for dark surfaces. Contrast border for elements placed on dark-themed containers.

variables.name: default theme/border/secondary
variables.description: Medium-contrast border. Use for card borders, internal table dividers, and secondary component outlines.

variables.name: default theme/border/tertiary
variables.description: Low-contrast subtle border. Use for low-emphasis decorative lines or subtle element separation.

variables.name: default theme/border/action
variables.description: Brand-colored border. Use for active focus states, selection rings, and brand-themed outlines.

variables.name: default theme/border/action-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for brand-colored borders. Visual feedback when hovering over interactive brand elements (e.g., secondary buttons)

variables.name: default theme/border/caution
variables.description: Dark border for warning-related components. Used for borders on warning banners, alert cards, or validation states.

variables.name: default theme/border/caution-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for warning-related borders. Visual feedback for interactive warning components on hover.

variables.name: default theme/border/danger
variables.description: Dark border for error-related components. Used for invalid input fields, error banners, or critical alert containers.

variables.name: default theme/border/danger-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for error-related borders. Visual feedback for interactive destructive or error components on hover.

variables.name: default theme/heading-underline/primary
variables.description: Brand-colored heading accent. A specific decorative variable used for brand underlines beneath main titles.

variables.name: green-light theme/background/primary
variables.description: The theme-specific base background. The primary light green surface for this theme.

variables.name: green-light theme/background/secondary
variables.description: Theme-specific secondary surface. Provides contrast against the light green background primary for cards and inputs

variables.name: green-dark theme/text/primary
variables.description: Main light text. Primary text color to ensure high readability on dark green backgrounds.

variables.name: green-dark theme/text/primary-inverse
variables.description: Dark text color. Used for contrast when text is placed on rare light-colored components within dark mode.

variables.name: green-dark theme/text/secondary
variables.description: Subtle light gray text. Used for secondary labels, metadata, and supporting information.

variables.name: green-dark theme/text/tertiary
variables.description: Low-contrast muted text. Used for disabled states or non-essential decorative text.

variables.name: green-dark theme/text/action
variables.description: Bright accent green. High-visibility interactive color for links and active navigation tabs.

variables.name: green-dark theme/text/action-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for action text. Strong feedback color when hovering over interactive links in dark mode.

variables.name: green-dark theme/background/primary
variables.description: Dark green base surface. The main background for all pages and primary content areas in dark mode.

variables.name: green-dark theme/background/primary-inverse
variables.description: Pure white surface. High-contrast callouts or special containers needing maximum attention.

variables.name: green-dark theme/background/secondary
variables.description: Muted brand green surface. Used for cards, nested sections, or secondary containers to create visual depth.

variables.name: green-dark theme/background/tertiary
variables.description: Gray decorative surface. Used for disabled components or low-priority containers in dark mode.

variables.name: green-dark theme/background/action
variables.description: Bright action surface. High-visibility background for primary buttons to stand out in dark environments.

variables.name: green-dark theme/background/action-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for action surfaces. Specifically for primary button hover effects and active brand surfaces.

variables.name: green-dark theme/background/caution-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for warning surfaces. Interaction feedback for warning banners or cards on hover.

variables.name: green-dark theme/background/danger-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for error surfaces. Interaction feedback for destructive buttons or error alerts on hover.

variables.name: green-dark theme/border/primary
variables.description: Light green border. Primary component boundaries and strong dividers for dark mode layouts.

variables.name: green-dark theme/border/primary-inverse
variables.description: Dark border color. Inverted border for elements placed on light-colored containers.

variables.name: green-dark theme/border/secondary
variables.description: Muted brand green border. Subtle separation for secondary UI elements or nested sections.

variables.name: green-dark theme/border/action
variables.description: Bright Interactive border. Used for active selection borders and focus rings in dark mode.

variables.name: green-dark theme/border/action-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for action borders. Feedback for interactive component outlines on hover.

variables.name: green-dark theme/border/caution-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for warning borders. Visual feedback for interactive warning containers on hover.

variables.name: green-dark theme/border/danger-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for error borders. Visual feedback for interactive error/destructive containers on hover.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/text/primary
variables.description: Main dark text. Primary text color for high contrast against warm light backgrounds.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/text/primary-inverse
variables.description: Light brand text. Used on dark containers (Like background primary inverse) for visibility.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/text/action
variables.description: Deep gold interactive text. Used for interactive links and active navigation labels.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/text/action-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for action text. Visual feedback when hovering over links or interactive labels.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/background/primary
variables.description: Light warm background. The foundational surface color for this theme.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/border/primary
variables.description: Deep gold border. Main border color for defining component boundaries.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/border/primary-inverse
variables.description: Brand gold accent. Specific decorative underline for headings.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/border/secondary
variables.description: Medium-contrast border for this theme. Use for card borders, internal table dividers, and secondary component outlines.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/border/action
variables.description: Brand-colored border for this theme. Use for active focus states, selection rings, and brand-themed outlines.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/border/action-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for borders for this theme. Visual feedback when hovering over interactive elements.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/border/caution-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for warning borders for this theme. Visual feedback for interactive warning containers on hover.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/border/danger-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for error-related borders for this theme. Visual feedback for interactive destructive or error components on hover.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/background/primary-inverse
variables.description: Deep gold surface. Used for high-contrast headers or primary emphasis sections.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/background/secondary
variables.description: Pure white surface. Used for cards or input fields to standout from the warm base background.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/background/tertiary
variables.description: Low-priority decorative surface. Use for disabled button backgrounds, progress bar tracks, or divider-like containers for this theme.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/background/action
variables.description: Golden action surface. Base color for primary buttons and active UI elements.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/background/action-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for action surfaces. Feedback color for interactive surfaces and buttons on hover.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/background/caution-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for warning surfaces. Interaction feedback for warning banners or cards on hover.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/background/danger-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for error surfaces. Interaction feedback for destructive buttons or error alerts on hover.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/border/tertiary
variables.description: Low-contrast subtle border for this theme. Use for low-emphasis decorative lines or subtle element separation.

variables.name: marigold-light theme/heading-underline/primary
variables.description: Brand-colored heading accent. A specific decorative variable used for underlines beneath main titles for this theme.

variables.name: stone-light theme/text/primary
variables.description: Deep stone text. Primary text color for maximum readability on neutral backgrounds.

variables.name: stone-light theme/text/primary-inverse
variables.description: Light stone text. Inverted text color for use on dark-themed sections.

variables.name: stone-light theme/text/action
variables.description: Muted stone interactive text. Used for links and active navigation elements in this theme.

variables.name: stone-light theme/text/action-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for action text. Feedback color for interactive text elements during hover.

variables.name: stone-light theme/background/primary
variables.description: Light stone background. The primary neutral surface color for this mode.

variables.name: stone-light theme/border/primary
variables.description: Muted stone border. Used for outlines of components and layout dividers.

variables.name: stone-light theme/border/primary-inverse
variables.description: Dark border for light surfaces. High-contrast border used for elements placed on the light stone background.

variables.name: stone-light theme/border/secondary
variables.description: Medium-contrast border. Used for secondary card outlines, internal dividers, and form elements.

variables.name: stone-light theme/border/tertiary
variables.description: Low contrast subtle border. Used for decorative lines, low-emphasis element separation, or disabled states.

variables.name: stone-light theme/border/action
variables.description: Muted stone interactive border. Base color for action selection borders and primary button outlines in this theme.

variables.name: stone-light theme/border/action-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for action borders. Strong feedback for interactive component outlines when hovered.

variables.name: stone-light theme/background/primary-inverse
variables.description: Deep stone surface. High-contrast dark surface for headers or sidebars for this theme.

variables.name: stone-light theme/background/secondary
variables.description: Pure white surface. Used for UI components like cards to pop against the stone background.

variables.name: stone-light theme/background/action
variables.description: Muted stone action surface. The base color for primary action buttons.

variables.name: stone-light theme/background/action-highlight
variables.description: Hover state for action surfaces. Visual feedback for interactive buttons or cards on hover.

variables.name: stone-light theme/heading-underline/primary
variables.description: Muted accent underline. Decorative variable for heading accents in the stone theme.
